summary: Completed backend + frontend testing for QS/BOQ professional workflow on public preview URL. Validated project/revision APIs, dynamic measurement editing/recalculation, undo/redo behavior, BOQ generation/edit/save, rate DB load/save, rough estimate mode, export actions/logs, and route regressions.
action_items: Optional test-hardening: load REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL in pytest setup (or conftest) so plain pytest runs do not silently skip when env is not exported in shell.
critical_code_review_comments: QS backend endpoints are migration-ready and correctly exclude MongoDB _id in responses.
Frontend QS workflow is genuinely editable (not static calculator): field edits recalculate live and persist via API.
No MOCKED APIs used during this run.
seed_data_creation: Created TEST_* QS projects/versions/rows and rates via API/UI during run.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Public URL used: https://buildcalc-estimate.preview.emergentagent.com. Pytest full run passed 33/33 after exporting frontend/.env. UI flows validated end-to-end on /estimate including revision creation and export-log rows creation.
rca of the issue: No product defects found in scoped QS features. One temporary false signal during route regression came from an incorrect selector (`market-rates-page` vs actual `local-market-rates-page`); route itself is healthy.
